message.content:
/blueprint Нужен Telegram-бот для записи на стрижку в одну парикмахерскую. Клиент пишет боту, выбирает мастера и время, бот сохраняет запись и отправляет напоминание за час. Админ-парикмахер видит все записи в отдельной команде /admin. Один мастер ведёт расписание сам через бота.

Pre-emptive clarifications (answer all your questions now so you don't need to ask):
1. Users: 1 owner-barber (admin) + their clients (walk-in Telegram users), ~50-200 clients expected
2. Auth: no auth for clients (just Telegram user_id), admin by hardcoded TELEGRAM_ADMIN_ID env var
3. Database: SQLite (single-file, no separate DB container)
4. Hosting: single Docker container on a small VPS ($5/month), no k8s, no cloud
5. Budget: ₽0, hobby project
6. Deadline: 2 weekends
7. Stack: Python 3.11 + aiogram 3.x (confirmed, not python-telegram-bot)
8. Reminders: simple in-process asyncio task checking every minute for appointments starting in 60 minutes
9. No payments, no multi-tenant (one barbershop), no web frontend
10. Admin views all appointments via /admin command inside the same bot

IMPORTANT: do NOT ask further clarifying questions. You have all the information you need. Proceed to Phase 2 (documentation generation) immediately. Generate all 6 blueprint documents (STRATEGIC_PLAN.md, PROJECT_ARCHITECTURE.md, PRD.md, IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md, CLAUDE_CODE_GUIDE.md, CLAUDE.md) in the current working directory.
